UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Information about the user and their assigned role.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

role.description: The role of the user, either owner or seller.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

Sale.title: Sale Record
Sale.description: A record of a transaction made by a seller.

/users/{userId}.description: Allows a user to read and write their own profile document where the document ID matches their authenticated UID.

/sales/{saleId}.description: Any authenticated user can create a sale. Users with the 'owner' role in their profile can read all sales.

/expenses/{expenseId}.description: Any authenticated user can create an expense. Users with the 'owner' role in their profile can read all expenses.
